archetype_reasoning: This trader has extraordinary accuracy in Russia_UKR (86%, 758W/123L) and solid performance in Trump_US (68.8%, 264W/120L), but catastrophically poor accuracy in 'Other' markets (12.6%, 49W/339L). The extreme divergence between domain performance and outside-domain performance is the defining signature of a domain specialist operating well beyond their edge. The recent resolved trades show a concentrated losing streak on a single Harris market at contested prices (~0.69-0.73), suggesting overconfidence extending into unfamiliar political territory.
domain_blindspots: Other: catastrophic 12.6% accuracy with 339 losses; trader appears to have no predictive edge and likely destroys PnL in non-core markets
domain_summary: Genuine, substantial edge in Russia-Ukraine conflict markets with near-elite accuracy, and a real but secondary edge in Trump/US political markets. Outside these two domains, this trader's accuracy collapses to near-random-or-worse levels, strongly suggesting they should be ignored on all other geopolitical topics.
signal_weight_reasoning: The trader's Russia_UKR accuracy of 86% across 881 trades is highly significant and warrants full-weight signal generation in that domain. Trump_US at 68.8% also merits partial-to-full weight. However, the 'Other' domain accuracy of 12.6% is so poor it represents negative signal — following this trader outside their domains would actively destroy alpha. Domain-only weighting is the appropriate policy.
behavioural_flags: Heavy concentration in single-market repeated trades — recent data shows 15 consecutive positions on the same Harris market
Directionality of 0.767 suggests meaningful but not extreme directional bias
Appears to scale into positions rather than taking single large entries (multiple similar-price entries on same market)
Extremely limited distinct geo markets (only 5) for a trader with 1,653 resolved trades — indicative of deep specialisation
risk_patterns: Sunk-cost behaviour likely: 15 consecutive losing trades on the same Harris market at near-identical prices suggests doubling down rather than reassessing
Outside-domain losses (339 losses in 'Other') suggest poor self-awareness about limits of expertise or inability to resist trading unfamiliar markets
geo_elo_active (1872) significantly below raw geo_elo (3481), suggesting recent underperformance or reduced activity — possible slump following the Harris market losses
Concentration risk: extraordinary volume on Russia_UKR means a market resolution mis-call in that domain could be highly damaging

notable_calls.significance: 758 wins at 86% accuracy across Russia-Ukraine conflict markets represents genuinely elite-level domain forecasting, likely the core PnL driver

notable_calls.market: Will Harris drop out of 2025 race before September?
notable_calls.significance: 15 repeated entries on a single market all resolved as losses — illustrates the danger of this trader outside their core domains and possible sunk-cost doubling behaviour

open_positions_summary: No open positions currently. Trader is entirely flat, which may reflect a deliberate pause following the Harris market losing streak or seasonal withdrawal.
watch_items: Monitor for re-entry into Russia_UKR markets — any new positions here carry high signal value given historical accuracy
Watch for further 'Other' domain entries as a risk flag — these have historically destroyed value
Track whether geo_elo_active recovers toward the raw ELO level, which would indicate return to form
Alert on any large-sized new positions given prior pattern of scaling into single markets repeatedly
summary: This trader is a genuine Russia-Ukraine specialist with an impressive 86% win rate across 881 trades in that domain, representing authentic forecasting edge that should be taken seriously. However, their 'Other' domain accuracy of 12.6% — with 339 losses — is so poor it nearly qualifies as anti-signal, and the recent Harris market losing streak (15 consecutive losses) suggests a harmful pattern of trading outside their competence. The gap between raw ELO (3481) and active ELO (1872) flags meaningful recent decay. Signal weight should be reserved exclusively for Russia_UKR and Trump_US positions; all other domain activity from this address should be actively discounted or faded.
